context: 2020 was a landmark year for Nigerian Afrobeats, with Burna Boy's 'Twice As Tall' and Wizkid's 'Made in Lagos' cementing the genre's global dominance. Davido's 'FEM' became the anthem of the #EndSARS protest movement. Simi's 'Duduke' was a cultural phenomenon, and DJ Neptune's 'Nobody' was inescapable across the continent.

tracks.title: Nobody
tracks.artist: DJ Neptune ft. Joeboy & Mr Eazi
